basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Consultant, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD)
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Scientific Medical) / Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support - III
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) Consultant (Scientific Medical) / Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support - III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICMR NIIRNCD. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 67 years for Consultant, Max 35 years for Project Technical Support.
age_limit.details: Consultant: Maximum 67 years. Project Technical Support: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per ICMR / DoPT guidelines for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-servicemen etc.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Graduate/Post Graduate in Public Health/Nursing/Life Science/Computer Science/IT
qualification.details: Consultant (Scientific Medical) / Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical): MBBS with R&D experience and Published Papers OR MPH with R&D experience and Published Papers OR Retired Government Employee with Pay Band Rs. 15600-39100 + GP Rs. 5400 and 20 years experience. Project Technical Support - III: Graduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Science with 3 years experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Public Health / Life Science OR Four-Year Graduate Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology.

salary_details.pay_scale: Max Rs. 70,000/- for Consultant, Rs. 28,000/- + HRA for Project Technical Support.
salary_details.details: Consultant (Scientific Medical) / Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical): Maximum Rs. 70,000/- per month. Project Technical Support - III: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Test (if more than 30 candidates for Project Technical Support - III) Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted through a walk-in interview, which is scheduled for 27 May 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Consultant (Scientific Medical) / Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support - III.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 67 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: The Project Technical Support - III post offers a salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and a Written Test (if applicable). Document verification will also be conducted.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support - III, a Graduate degree in Public Health/Nursing/Life Science with 3 years of experience, or a Post Graduate Degree in Public Health/Life Science, or a Four-Year Graduate Degree in Computer Science/IT is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per the guidelines of ICMR and DoPT for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-servicemen and other eligible categories.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable).
